Config structs are injected as pointers; value parameters get a
pointer hint instead of a generic missing-provider error.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/config v0.0.0

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/config => CONFIGDIR
-- main.go --
package main

func main() {
	if err := run(); err != nil {
		panic(err)
	}
}
-- store/store.go --
package store

//fabrik:config store
type Config struct {
	Kind string `yaml:"kind" default:"memory"`
}

//fabrik:init
func Setup(c Config) error { return nil }

type DB struct{}

//fabrik:provider
func Open(c Config) *DB { return &DB{} }
-- web/web.go --
package web

import (
	"net/http"

	"app/store"
)

type Handlers struct {
	DB *store.DB
}

//fabrik:http GET /
func (h *Handlers) Index(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}
-- want/diags --
error: store/store.go:9:12: init parameters must be context.Context or //fabrik:config structs (inits run before providers)
  help: config structs are injected as pointers; take *store.Config
error: store/store.go:14:11: no provider for store.Config
  help: config structs are injected as pointers; take *store.Config
